---
title: "Code-Along 9: Strings and Dates"
filters:
  - versions
versions:
  - student:
      out-dir: ".."
      yaml:
        author: "Your Name"
        embed-resources: true
  - solution:
      out-dir: ".."
      out-file: "09-code-along-solution.qmd"
      yaml:
        author: "SOLUTIONS"
        embed-resources: true
format: 
  html:
    code-tools: true
    toc: true      
execute: 
  error: true
  echo: true
  message: false
  warning: false
---

- "clean up" the grant name by replacing words `str_replace_all()`
- Calculate the total length of the grant in days
- Calculate the number of days that had passed for the grant before it was terminated
- Calculate the % of the grant time that was allowed
